Class Course

java.lang.Object
models.Course
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Course extends Object implements Serializable
Represents an academic course offered by the university.

A Course has a unique identifier, a credit value, an optional list of LessonTypes that make up its schedule, and a list of teacher names responsible for it.

Two static rule-enforcement helpers are provided:

  • canRegister(List, Course) — checks the credit-hour limit.
  • hasNotExceededFails(int) — checks the failure limit.

Equality and hashing are based solely on courseId, so two Course objects with the same ID are considered the same course regardless of other fields.

See Also:
  • Student
  • LessonType
  • Serialized Form

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    MAX_CREDITS
    Maximum total credit hours a student may register for in one semester.
    static final int
    MAX_FAILS
    Maximum number of failed courses a student may accumulate before further course registration is blocked.

    Description
    Course(String name, int credits)
    Convenience constructor that auto-generates the course ID from the first four characters of the name, upper-cased.
    Course(String courseId, String name, int credits)
    Full constructor with an explicit course ID.

  • Field Details

    • MAX_CREDITS

      public static final int MAX_CREDITS
      Maximum total credit hours a student may register for in one semester.
      See Also:
      • canRegister(List, Course)
      • Constant Field Values

    • MAX_FAILS

      public static final int MAX_FAILS
      Maximum number of failed courses a student may accumulate before further course registration is blocked.
      See Also:
      • hasNotExceededFails(int)
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • Course

      public Course(String name, int credits)
      Convenience constructor that auto-generates the course ID from the first four characters of the name, upper-cased.

      Example: new Course("Computer Networks", 3) produces ID "COMP".

      Parameters:
      name - full course name (must have at least one character)
      credits - credit-hour value (should be > 0)

    • Course

      public Course(String courseId, String name, int credits)
      Full constructor with an explicit course ID.
      Parameters:
      courseId - unique course identifier (must not be null)
      name - full course name
      credits - credit-hour value
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if courseId is null

  • Method Details

    • addLesson

      public void addLesson(LessonType lessonType)
      Adds a lesson type to this course's lesson schedule.
      Parameters:
      lessonType - the type of lesson to add (e.g. LECTURE, LAB)

    • addTeacher

      public void addTeacher(String teacherName)
      Associates a teacher with this course.
      Parameters:
      teacherName - display name or username of the teacher

    • canRegister

      public static boolean canRegister(List<Course> currentCourses, Course newCourse)
      Returns true if adding newCourse would keep the student within the 21-credit-hour semester limit.
      Parameters:
      currentCourses - courses the student is already registered for
      newCourse - the candidate course to add
      Returns:
      true if the combined credit total does not exceed 21

    • hasNotExceededFails

      public static boolean hasNotExceededFails(int failCount)
      Returns true if the student has not yet reached the maximum number of course failures (3).
      Parameters:
      failCount - number of courses the student has already failed
      Returns:
      true if failCount < MAX_FAILS

    • getCourseId

      public String getCourseId()
      Returns the unique course identifier.
      Returns:
      course ID (never null)

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns the full course name.
      Returns:
      course name

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Updates the course name.
      Parameters:
      name - new name (must not be null)

    • getCredits

      public int getCredits()
      Returns the credit-hour value of this course.
      Returns:
      number of credits

    • setCredits

      public void setCredits(int credits)
      Updates the credit-hour value.
      Parameters:
      credits - new credit value (should be > 0)

    • getLessons

      public List<LessonType> getLessons()
      Returns the list of lesson types scheduled for this course.
      Returns:
      mutable list of LessonTypes

    • getTeachers

      public List<String> getTeachers()
      Returns the list of teacher names assigned to this course.
      Returns:
      mutable list of teacher names / usernames

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object o)
      Two courses are equal if and only if they share the same courseId.
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      o - object to compare
      Returns:
      true if o is a Course with the same ID

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Returns a summary string including ID, name, credits, teachers, and lesson types.
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object
      Returns:
      human-readable course description
